parsedObject.publishInstructions: Upload to Gumroad/Etsy as a PDF or text file containing the prompts. Target social media marketing groups and communities.
parsedObject.fileContent:
## AI Social Media Post Prompt Pack Outline

**I. Introduction**
    A. Welcome & How to Use This Pack
    B. Benefits of Using AI for Social Media Content

**II. Platform-Specific Prompts**
    A. Instagram
        1. Feed Posts (Image/Carousel)
            a. Promotional
            b. Educational/Tips
            c. Engaging Questions
            d. Behind-the-Scenes
            e. User-Generated Content Call-to-Action
        2. Stories
            a. Interactive (Polls, Quizzes)
            b. Behind-the-Scenes Sneak Peeks
            c. Quick Tips/Facts
            d. Product Spotlights
        3. Reels
            a. Trend-Based Ideas
            b. Tutorial/How-To
            c. Before & After
            d. Humorous/Relatable
    B. Facebook
        1. Posts (Text, Image, Video)
            a. Community Building Questions
            b. Sharing Industry News/Articles
            c. Live Video Prompts
            d. Event Promotion
            e. Customer Testimonials
    C. Twitter
        1. Tweets
            a. Quick Tips/Facts
            b. Engaging Polls
            c. Thread Starters
            d. Retweetable Content Ideas
            e. Industry News Commentary
    D. LinkedIn
        1. Professional Posts
            a. Thought Leadership
            b. Industry Insights
            c. Career Advice
            d. Company Updates/Milestones
            e. Networking Questions
    E. TikTok
        1. Video Concepts
            a. Challenge Ideas
            b. Duet/Stitch Prompts
            c. Educational Snippets
            d. Behind-the-Scenes/Day in the Life
            e. Product Demos

**III. Content Type Prompts (Cross-Platform Application)**
    A. Promotional Content
        1. Product/Service Launches
        2. Special Offers/Discounts
        3. Event Announcements
    B. Educational Content
        1. How-To Guides
        2. Industry Tips & Tricks
        3. Explaining Complex Concepts
        4. Myth Busting
    C. Engaging Content
        1. Questions to Spark Discussion
        2. Polls & Surveys
        3. Fill-in-the-Blanks
        4. 'This or That' Scenarios
    D. Behind-the-Scenes Content
        1. Team Spotlights
        2. Workspace Tours
        3. Product Creation Process
        4. 'A Day in the Life'
    E. User-Generated Content (UGC) Prompts
        1. Photo/Video Challenges
        2. Testimonial Requests
        3. Sharing Customer Experiences

**IV. Advanced Prompting Techniques**
    A. Tailoring Prompts to Brand Voice
    B. Incorporating Keywords & Hashtags
    C. Crafting Calls-to-Action (CTAs)

**V. Conclusion**
    A. Tips for Maximizing Prompt Effectiveness
    B. Encouragement & Next Steps

parsedObject.fileContent:
## AI Social Media Post Prompt Pack Outline

**I. Introduction**
    A. Welcome & Purpose of the Pack
    B. How to Get the Most Out of These Prompts
    C. Tips for Adapting Prompts to Your Brand

**II. Prompt Categories**
    A. **Engagement Boosters**
        1. Questions for Audience Interaction
        2. Poll/Quiz Ideas
        3. Fill-in-the-Blank Posts
        4. 'This or That' Scenarios
    B. **Educational & Informative Content**
        1. Quick Tips & Hacks
        2. Myth Busting
        3. 'Did You Know?' Facts
        4. How-To Guides (Mini)
    C. **Promotional & Product Focused**
        1. New Product/Service Announcements
        2. Feature Spotlights
        3. Testimonial Requests
        4. Behind-the-Scenes of Your Business
    D. **Inspirational & Motivational**
        1. Quotes & Affirmations
        2. Success Stories
        3. Gratitude Posts
    E. **Community & Trend Focused**
        1. User-Generated Content Prompts
        2. Holiday/Event Tie-ins
        3. Current Trend Adaptations

**III. Advanced Prompting Techniques**
    A. Incorporating Keywords
    B. Targeting Specific Audience Segments
    C. Experimenting with Tone and Voice

**IV. Platform-Specific Considerations (Optional/Brief)**
    A. Instagram
    B. Facebook
    C. LinkedIn
    D. Twitter/X

**V. Conclusion**
    A. Encouragement & Next Steps

finalObject.fileContent:
# AI Social Media Post Prompt Pack

Struggling to come up with fresh and engaging social media content ideas? Our AI Social Media Post Prompt Pack is your ultimate solution. Designed for content creators, marketers, and small business owners, this pack provides a comprehensive collection of AI-generated prompts to spark creativity and streamline your social media workflow. Stop staring at a blank screen and start crafting compelling posts that resonate with your audience.

## How To Use
1. Pick the prompt category that matches your immediate goal.
2. Paste the prompt into your AI tool and replace placeholders with your own context.
3. Save the best outputs, refine them, and repeat with the follow-up prompts.

## Research And Positioning
1. ## AI Social Media Post Prompt Pack Outline
2. A. Welcome & How to Use This Pack
3. B. Benefits of Using AI for Social Media Content
4. **II. Platform-Specific Prompts**
5. Feed Posts (Image/Carousel)
6. c. Engaging Questions

## Creation And Delivery
1. d. Behind-the-Scenes
2. e. User-Generated Content Call-to-Action
3. a. Interactive (Polls, Quizzes)
4. b. Behind-the-Scenes Sneak Peeks
5. d. Product Spotlights
6. a. Trend-Based Ideas

## Marketing And Optimization
1. d. Humorous/Relatable
2. Posts (Text, Image, Video)
3. a. Community Building Questions
4. b. Sharing Industry News/Articles
5. c. Live Video Prompts
6. e. Customer Testimonials

## Scaling And Retention
1. d. Retweetable Content Ideas
2. e. Industry News Commentary
3. a. Thought Leadership
4. b. Industry Insights
5. d. Company Updates/Milestones
6. e. Networking Questions

## Final Tips
- Be specific about your audience, offer, and constraints before running a prompt.
- Reuse strong outputs as source material for the next prompt in the pack.
- Keep a swipe file of the best responses so you can improve them over time.

File to upload: ai-social-media-post-prompt-pack.md
